message:
feat(reaper): add multi-database purge to gt reaper purge (gt-wfs-vewys)

When --db is omitted, auto-discover all databases and purge closed wisps
and mail past their retention windows. Prints per-database results plus
a summary. Single-db mode (--db=X) still works. JSON output returns an
array for consistency.

Continues the multi-database pattern from scan and reap commands.
